_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct periodic system maintenance including cleaning (both physically and electronically), disk checks, routine reboots, data dumps, and testing.
reference_document_element_description: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.522), OP-T-007 (OP, cosine: 0.494).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.649). Shared vocabulary: [data, maintenance, routine]. DCWF-only terms [checks, cleaning, conduct, disk, dumps, electronically] vs WIDAI-only terms [cleanup, configuration, documentation, execute, job, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.895, R=0.904). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Conduct periodic system maintenance including cleaning (both physically and elec" and "Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.647 ≈ STS 0.649 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, maintenance, routine] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.5%. Shared tokens: [data, maintenance, routine]. DCWF-only: [checks, cleaning, conduct, disk, dumps, electronically]. WIDAI-only: [cleanup, configuration, documentation, execute, job, operational].
